title: Feuilleea schimperiana
taxonomy: Feuilleea schimperiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is native to Madagascar and is often found in high-altitude forests. The exact classification within the family Celastraceae is within the subfamily Ceinturonioideae. It is also known to be closely related to the genus Gymnosporia. Further classification details may vary depending on the specific source.
